title: “Refinery workers are on the front line of refinery safety”
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The explosion at the Torrance refinery on February 18, 2015, caused an 80,000-pound section of the refinery to fly almost a hundred feet.",
    "The explosion at the Torrance refinery was described by the chair of the U.S. Chemical Safety Board as a near catastrophe.",
    "Hydrofluoric acid, if released, can form a ground-hugging cloud and drift for miles, posing a threat to the lives of refinery workers and nearby residents.",
    "Refineries can be dangerous places, necessitating a highly skilled workforce to maintain and operate them safely.",
    "The presence of out-of-state contract workers with little training and experience at refineries is a concern for safety."
  ]
}
```
